data.body: 8d8e close BLOCKED by verifier: (a) real gap — degrade test only covers sign_manifest in isolation, need ORCHESTRATOR-level plan-review PASS -> {signed:false} + exit 0 when ssh-keygen unavailable AND unwritable-tracker sub-case; (b) 'make test green' AC needs CI-evidence comment (cite #685 Verified+1). ee0b implementer FINISHED green (full service+client, sign_completion_verdict extracted, 5876 pass). Plan: subagent adds 8d8e degrade test -> #685 PS3; parallel I validate ee0b held-out oracles; then rebase ee0b onto PS3.
